underlying_goal: Set up and execute Phase 0 (behavior recording) for a Boss直聘 semi-automated recruitment tool, capturing real browser interactions to extract correct URLs, selectors, and UI patterns, then update the codebase accordingly
friction_detail: Initial recording script had output capturing issues requiring restart, and the recorder failed to capture some search-specific events due to internal container scrolling and framework event interception.
brief_summary: User guided Claude through recording Boss直聘 browser interactions to extract real selectors/URLs, then updated the codebase with correct search (infinite scroll) and profile (overlay) patterns, initialized git, and committed — all completed successfully.
